phase_name: Auto-purge events older than 48 hours from dashboard

completed_tasks.name: Remove ended-only filter, add cascading cleanup for mappings and notifications

decisions.decision: Purge ALL events >48h regardless of prophetx_status
decisions.rationale: Previous filter only purged 'ended' events, leaving stale scheduled/live events on dashboard indefinitely

decisions.decision: Cascade delete event_id_mappings and notifications for purged events
decisions.rationale: Prevent orphaned rows in related tables
Append-only by design — never purge audit records

next_action: Monitor dashboard after next cleanup cycle (runs every 6h) to confirm old events are being purged. Then consider starting next milestone (/gsd:new-milestone).
context_notes: Quick task 260331-fmz fully completed and deployed to production (Hetzner VPS at 46.225.233.32). Worker and beat services rebuilt and restarted. No active milestone — v1.1 shipped, project is in ad-hoc quick task mode. OddsBlaze integration (260330-nvd) also deployed from prior session.
